    SongCell - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    A ListCell that renders a Song as a horizontal row containing an optional 40px album-art thumbnail, the song title, the primary artist name, and an optional context-menu trigger button.
    SongCell() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongCell
     
    SongCell(List, MusicPlayerService, PlaylistService, FavouriteService, BiConsumer, boolean) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongCell
    Constructs a fully interactive SongCell with a context-menu button.

    SongEditDialog - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    A modal dialog that allows the user to edit the metadata of a Song.
    SongEditDialog(SongRepository, AlbumRepository, ArtistRepository, GenreRepository) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongEditDialog
    Constructs a SongEditDialog with the repositories needed to look up and persist metadata entities.
    SongHandler - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews
    Handles song-level user interactions by presenting a ContextMenu anchored to the triggering UI element.

    Constructs a SongHandler.
